title: astragalus longiscapus
intro: Astragalus longiscapus, also known as the long-beaked milkvetch, is a plant species in the legume family native to China and the Himalayas. It is a perennial herb with a long history of use in traditional Chinese medicine, valued for its anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory properties, which can help to boost the immune system and reduce stress. The medicinal properties of Astragalus longiscapus have been found to possess antioxidant, anti-fatigue, and anti-aging effects, leading to potential health benefits such as improved cardiovascular health, enhanced respiratory function, and increased vitality. Astragalus longiscapus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including capsules, tablets, and teas, as well as infused into topical creams and oils for external use.
